---
title: "Analysis Enrollment"
output:
  pdf_document:
    keep_tex:  true
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(magrittr)
library(AER)
library(stargazer)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
# library(reshape)
library(reshape2)
library(knitr) 
library(kableExtra)
library(magick)
```

# Load Data

```{r}
dropbox_dir <- '~/Dropbox/'
```


```{r}
pref <- read.csv(paste(dropbox_dir, 'Capacity expansion in stable matching/Data/2018/preferencias.csv',sep=''), sep=";")
schools <- read.csv(paste(dropbox_dir, 'Capacity expansion in stable matching/Data/2018/cursos.csv',sep=''), sep=";")
students <- read.csv(paste(dropbox_dir, 'Capacity expansion in stable matching/Data/2018/postulantes.csv',sep=''), sep=";")
siblings <- read.csv(paste(dropbox_dir, 'SAE - Personal/Code/Boris/input/pares_hermanos.csv',sep=''), sep=";")
```

```{r}
students_with_siblings <- unique(union(siblings$id_postulante, siblings$id_hermano))
```


Note: there are some schools that have different codigo de ensenanza. The reason is that you may have the same school offering morning and afternoon, so this is the same school but with two different codes. Admission to those is separate, so that is why we consider them as different schools.


```{r}
students %>% nrow() # 274990
students %>% filter(id_postulante %in% students_with_siblings) %>% nrow() # 44810

students %>% filter(id_region == 12) %>% nrow() # 5113
students %>% filter(id_region == 12 & id_postulante %in% students_with_siblings) %>% nrow() # 1300

schools %>% distinct(rbd) %>% nrow() # 6421
schools %>% filter(id_region == 12) %>% distinct(rbd) %>% nrow() # 61
```

```{r}
df <- merge(pref, students, all.x=TRUE, by='id_postulante')
```

```{r}
df %>% nrow() # 874565
df %>% filter(id_region == 12) %>% nrow() # 15426
```

```{r}
head(dat)
```
```{r}
dat %>% group_by(cod_nivel_main) %>% tally()
```


```{r}
dat <- readRDS(paste(dropbox_dir, 'Capacity expansion in stable matching/Code/R/intermediate_data/application_and_enrollment_2018.rds',sep=''))
```

```{r}
tot <- dat %>% filter(number_of_applications_main > 0) %>% nrow()
dat %>% dplyr::summarise(assigned_main = sum(!is.na(rbd_main)/tot),
                   assigned_top_main = sum(preferencia_postulante_main == 1, na.rm=TRUE)/tot, assigned_current_main = sum(rbd_main == RBD_2018, na.rm=TRUE)/tot)
```

```{r}
head(dat)
```
